subject: Project timeline discussion
body: Let's discuss the et-rust project timeline tomorrow at 10am. We need to review the quarterly milestones and budget allocation.

subject: Quarterly report review
body: Please find attached the quarterly report for Q1. The project deliverables are on track and we exceeded our targets.

subject: Budget meeting scheduled
body: The spacex rocket budget meeting is scheduled for next week. We will discuss project costs and resource allocation for the upcoming quarter.
